headline.purpose: Panel and form headers; may be uppercase on document-module screens.

body.purpose: Table cells and form text; weight 650 for emphasized data.

label.purpose: Account chips, role tags, breadcrumbs, footers. Small but never light.

shadows.name: header-float
shadows.purpose: Only the sticky floating app header. The One Shadow Rule: no other shadows exist.

motion.name: restrained-default
motion.purpose: Motion is state feedback only; no choreography. Respect prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Navy institutional action button used for the main action of a document panel.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M5 12h14M12 5v14"/></svg>Create eBupot BP21</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem; background: oklch(0.28 0.09 270); color: oklch(0.98 0.005 250); border: none; border-radius: 0.55rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.33 0.095 270); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.55 0.08 270); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Toolbar Button
components.description: Neutral secondary action in panel toolbars.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.39 0.05 265); border: 1px solid oklch(0.89 0.014 255); border-radius: 0.55rem; padding: 0.45rem 0.9rem; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 650; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.955 0.008 250); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.55 0.08 270); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Status Side Tab
components.description: Left-panel status navigation with count badge; sky tint marks the active tab.
components.css: .ds-side-tabs { display: grid; width: 16rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.89 0.014 255); border-radius: 0.35rem; overflow: hidden; background: oklch(0.99 0.004 250); } .ds-side-tab { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; border: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.91 0.012 255); background: transparent; color: oklch(0.39 0.04 265); font-weight: 650; font-size: 0.88rem; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; } .ds-side-tab:hover { background: oklch(0.965 0.008 250); } .ds-side-tab.active { background: oklch(0.93 0.025 210); color: oklch(0.28 0.08 270); } .ds-side-tab__count { border: 1px solid oklch(0.89 0.014 255); border-radius: 0.35rem; background: oklch(0.972 0.008 250); font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 750; padding: 0.05rem 0.4rem; }

components.name: Identity Block
components.description: Navy taxpayer-identity header at the top of every document side panel.
components.css: .ds-identity { display: grid; gap: 0.2rem; width: 16rem; background: oklch(0.28 0.09 270); color: oklch(0.98 0.005 250); padding: 1rem; border-radius: 0.35rem 0.35rem 0 0; } .ds-identity strong { font-size: 1.35rem; line-height: 1; } .ds-identity span { font-weight: 650; font-size: 0.9rem; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Slip lifecycle badge: label + color together, never color alone.
components.html: Telah Terbit Belum Terbit Tidak Valid
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-block; border-radius: 0.35rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 750; padding: 0.15rem 0.5rem; } .ds-badge--issued { background: oklch(0.94 0.06 150); color: oklch(0.35 0.09 150); } .ds-badge--draft { background: oklch(0.96 0.055 92); color: oklch(0.33 0.07 80); } .ds-badge--invalid { background: oklch(0.95 0.035 25); color: oklch(0.42 0.13 25); }

components.name: Module Nav Link
components.description: Topbar module-menu item; gold underline marks the active module (The Gold Thread Rule).
components.html: eBUPOTSPTPembayaran
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; background: oklch(0.99 0.004 250); padding: 0.4rem 1rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.014 255); border-radius: 0.55rem; } .ds-nav__link { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 2.75rem; padding: 0 1.25rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; color: oklch(0.31 0.095 270); font-size: 0.92rem; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav__link:hover { color: oklch(0.27 0.095 270); background: oklch(0.965 0.01 250); } .ds-nav__link.active { color: oklch(0.22 0.08 270); background: oklch(0.97 0.05 92 / 0.55); } .ds-nav__link.active::after { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 0.9rem; right: 0.9rem; bottom: 0.2rem; height: 0.13rem; background: oklch(0.79 0.16 82); }

components.name: Note Callout
components.description: Amber instructional note on create forms.
components.html: Dokumen ini adalah simulasi untuk pembelajaran. Gunakan data dummy saja.
components.css: .ds-note { border: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.075 92); border-radius: 0.35rem; background: oklch(0.96 0.055 92); color: oklch(0.33 0.07 80); font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 650; padding: 0.8rem; max-width: 40rem; }

narrative.overview: PajakSim looks like the desk of a well-run government service counter: light, formal, paper-adjacent surfaces; navy ink that means authority; a restrained gold thread that marks where you are. The layout skeleton is borrowed deliberately from Indonesia's national tax portal. Fidelity to that skeleton is pedagogy: students must recognize the real system in this one. The identity (crest, names, colors) is entirely our own. This system explicitly rejects consumer-SaaS cheerfulness, the generic admin-template look, and dark mode. It is dense but ordered, serious but not hostile.
keyCharacteristics: Light institutional surfaces, OKLCH-only color, no pure black or white
Navy carries authority (identity blocks, primary actions); gold marks active navigation
Heavy weight contrast (400 body vs 750-900 headings/labels) instead of size inflation
Flat panels with 1px borders; shadows reserved for the sticky header
Status is always label + color, never color alone

rules.name: The Gold Thread Rule
rules.body: Gold exists only for wayfinding and insignia: active nav states, the crest, instructional notes. Never on buttons, table data, or decoration. Its rarity is what makes the menubar legible.

rules.name: The No-Hex Rule
rules.body: All color values are written in OKLCH, in code and in this spec. Never #000, never #fff; every neutral is tinted toward the blue brand hue.

rules.name: The Weight-Not-Size Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is built by jumping weight (400 to 650 to 800), not by inflating size. If a heading exceeds 1.4rem, question it.

rules.name: The One Shadow Rule
rules.body: No new box-shadows. A panel that needs separation gets a border or a tonal step, not a shadow.

dos: Do reuse the .bupot-* shell for every document module; fidelity to the reference layout is the feature.
Do write every color as OKLCH and tint neutrals toward hue 250-270.
Do build hierarchy with weight jumps (400/650/800) at compact sizes.
Do keep UI copy in Bahasa Indonesia, with the deliberate English exceptions the reference system itself uses on document screens.
Do keep tables dense: >=0.85rem text, server pagination, one action column.
donts: Don't use the real national tax system's name, logo, or official seals anywhere. The brand is 'Sistem Pembelajaran Pajak Online' / PajakSim with the generic landmark crest.
Don't introduce consumer-SaaS cheerfulness: no pastel gradients, mascots, confetti, or rounded-everything.
Don't ship dark mode; this is a light, formal, classroom interface.
Don't add box-shadows beyond the header float, side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px as accent), gradient text, or glassmorphism.
Don't convey status with color alone, and don't invent new status colors beyond warning/success/error.
Don't fall back to the generic admin-template look; when unsure, copy the reference system's pattern, not a SaaS dashboard's.
